chunks.text: Course: EE 221A | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 221A. Linear System Theory Catalog Description: Basic system concepts; state-space and I/O representation. Properties of linear systems. Controllability, observability, minimality, state and output-feedback. Stability. Observers. Characteristic polynomial. Nyquist test. Units: 4 Also Offered As: ELENG 221A Related Areas: Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO) Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR) Signal Processing (SP) Prerequisites: 120; Mathematics 110 recommended. Formats: Fall: 3 hours of lecture and 2 hours of recitation per week Spring: 3 hours of lecture and 2 hours of recitation per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
